claims.text: Minnesota limits cooperation with ICE detainers and related federal immigration enforcement requests in some contexts.
Tim Walz used the phrase 'modern-day Gestapo' to describe ICE actions.
Tim Walz made the '30-foot ladder factory' border-wall joke in a CNN interview.

sources.notes: House Oversight hearing source to confirm exchange between Crane and Walz.
Keith Ellison public statements on Minnesota and federal immigration enforcement cooperation.
Records reflecting DOJ or federal action concerning Minnesota immigration cooperation disputes.
Walz speech where the Gestapo comparison appeared.
ICE or DHS response to the Gestapo comparison.
Original Anderson Cooper interview containing the ladder-factory quote.

patterns.name: hero_villain
patterns.description: Frames Crane as strong truth-teller and Walz as weak or dishonest villain.

patterns.name: omission_of_context
patterns.description: Uses accurate quotes but strips surrounding policy or legal context.

patterns.name: fear_amplification
patterns.description: Uses sanctuary-state and social-chaos framing to intensify perceived threat.
